name: @serge/mcp-server
description: Help Claude browse your website better. Instruments every navigation step — clicks, searches, form fills — with timing, screenshots, and detailed accessibility analysis so you can optimize your site for AI-assisted browsing.

tools.name: serge_start_session
tools.description: Start a benchmarking session to measure how Claude navigates a website

tools.name: serge_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a URL and return the page structure.

tools.name: serge_read_page
tools.description: Read the current page as a structured accessibility tree.

tools.name: serge_click
tools.description: Click an element identified by its accessibility role and name.

tools.name: serge_type
tools.description: Type text into a form field.

tools.name: serge_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page up or down.

tools.name: serge_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page

tools.name: serge_end_session
tools.description: End the session and generate a performance report.
